speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: This is the air; that is the glorious sun.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: This pearl she gave me, I do feel ’t and see ’t.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: And though ’tis wonder that enwraps me thus,

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Yet ’tis not madness. Where’s Antonio, then?

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: I could not find him at the Elephant.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Yet there he was; and there I found this credit,

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: That he did range the town to seek me out.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: His counsel now might do me golden service.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: For though my soul disputes well with my sense

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: That this may be some error, but no madness,

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Yet doth this accident and flood of fortune

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: So far exceed all instance, all discourse,

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: That I am ready to distrust mine eyes

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: And wrangle with my reason that persuades me

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: To any other trust but that I am mad—

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Or else the lady’s mad. Yet if ’twere so,

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: She could not sway her house, command her followers,

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Take and give back affairs and their dispatch

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: With such a smooth, discreet, and stable bearing

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: As I perceive she does. There’s something in ’t

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: That is deceivable. But here the lady comes.

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Blame not this haste of mine. If you mean well,

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Now go with me and with this holy man

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Into the chantry by. There, before him

speaker: OLIVIA
text: And underneath that consecrated roof,

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Plight me the full assurance of your faith,

speaker: OLIVIA
text: That my most jealous and too doubtful soul

speaker: OLIVIA
text: May live at peace. He shall conceal it

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Whiles you are willing it shall come to note,

speaker: OLIVIA
text: What time we will our celebration keep

speaker: OLIVIA
text: According to my birth. What do you say?

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: I’ll follow this good man and go with you,

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: And, having sworn truth, ever will be true.

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Then lead the way, good father, and heavens so shine

speaker: OLIVIA
text: That they may fairly note this act of mine.
